description: An agent is meeting a potential seller and needs to prepare a listing presentation to win their business.

nodes.task_description: Prepare a Comparative Market Analysis (CMA) for the seller's property.

expected_outcome.value: A detailed CMA report is generated.

nodes.task_description: Prepare a marketing plan outlining how the property will be advertised (e.g., online, social media, print).

expected_outcome.value: A customized marketing plan is created for the specific property.

nodes.task_description: Combine the CMA, marketing plan, and agent's resume into a single presentation deck.

expected_outcome.value: A professional slide deck is assembled, ready for the client meeting.
